assignments.name: Contact_MIR_Status_Agent_Replied_Follow_Up
assignments.label: Contact MIR Status Agent Replied - Follow Up

assignments.name: Lead_MIR_Status_Agent_Replied_Follow_Up
assignments.label: Lead MIR Status Agent Replied - Follow Up

assignments.name: RBIS_Contact_Update_First_MQL_Date
assignments.label: RBIS - Contact Update First MQL Date

assignments.name: RBIS_Lead_Update_First_MQL_Date
assignments.label: RBIS - Lead Update First MQL Date

assignments.name: SECT_Update_Contact_Last_Call_Date
assignments.label: SECT - Update Contact Last Call Date

assignments.name: SECT_Update_Contact_Last_Email_Sent_Date
assignments.label: SECT - Update Contact Last Email Sent Date

assignments.name: SECT_Update_Lead_Last_Call_Date
assignments.label: SECT - Update Lead Last Call Date

assignments.name: SECT_Update_Lead_Last_Email_Sent_Date
assignments.label: SECT - Update Lead Last Email Sent Date

assignments.name: Set_MIR_Status_to_Agent_Replied_Contact
assignments.label: Set MIR Status to Agent Replied (Contact)

assignments.name: Set_MIR_Status_to_Agent_Replied_Lead
assignments.label: Set MIR Status to Agent Replied (Lead)

rules.name: Yes_Eligible_for_CU_Agent_Contact
rules.conditionLogic: (1 OR 2 OR 14 OR 15 OR 16) AND 3 AND 4 AND (5 OR 6 OR 17) AND 7 AND ((8 AND 9) OR 10 OR 11) AND 12 AND 13
rules.label: Yes, Eligible for CU Agent (Contact)

rules.name: Yes_Eligible_for_CU_Agent
rules.conditionLogic: (1 OR 2 OR 10 OR 11 OR 12) AND 3 AND 4 AND (5 OR 6 OR 13) AND 7 AND 8 AND 9
rules.label: Yes, Eligible for CU Agent

decisions.name: Need_to_Contact_Update_First_MQL_Date
decisions.label: Need to Contact Update First MQL Date?

rules.name: Yes_Need_to_Contact_Update_First_MQL_Date
rules.label: Yes, Need to Contact Update First MQL Date

decisions.name: Need_to_Update_First_MQL_Date
decisions.label: Need to Update First MQL Date?

rules.name: Yes_Need_to_Update_First_MQL_Date
rules.label: Yes, Need to Update First MQL Date

rules.name: Yes_New_Email_task
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5 AND ((6 AND (7 OR 8)) OR (9 AND (10 AND 11)))
rules.label: Yes, New Email task

rules.name: Yes_Related_to_Lead
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND (2 OR (3 AND 4) OR (5 AND 6) OR 7 OR 8)
rules.label: Yes, Related to Lead

decisions.name: Rule_CLCUS_Contact_Last_CU_Status_is_Blank
decisions.label: *Rule (CLCUS)* - Contact Last CU Status is Blank?

rules.name: Copy_1_of_RLA_Relevant
rules.conditionLogic: ((1 OR 2 OR 3) AND 4 AND 5) AND 6 AND NOT(7)
rules.label: Lead - Last Activity Updated

rules.name: Contact_Last_Activity_Updated
rules.conditionLogic: ((1 OR 2 OR 3) AND 4 AND 5) AND 6 AND NOT(7)
rules.label: Contact - Last Activity Updated

decisions.name: Rule_LLCUS_Lead_Last_CU_Status_is_Blank
decisions.label: *Rule (LLCUS)* - Lead Last CU Status is Blank?

decisions.name: Rule_RBIS_Relevant_for_BI_Intent_Score_Update
decisions.label: *Rule (RBIS)* - Relevant for BI Intent Score Update?

rules.name: RBIS_Lead_Relevant_for_Intent_Update
rules.label: RBIS - Lead Relevant for Intent Update

rules.name: RBIS_Contact_Relevant_for_Intent_Update
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND (2 OR (3 AND (4 OR 5))) AND 6 AND 7
rules.label: RBIS - Contact Relevant for Intent Update

decisions.name: Rule_RLA_MIR_Relevant_for_Last_Activity_by_MIR
decisions.label: *Rule (RLA-MIR)* - Relevant for Last Activity by MIR?

rules.name: RLA_MIR_Relevant
rules.conditionLogic: ((1 OR 2 OR 3) AND 4 AND 5) AND (6 OR 7) AND 8 AND 9 AND 10 AND NOT(11)
rules.label: RLA-MIR - Relevant

decisions.description: MIS-5810 - excluded internal Account from automation MIS-5675
decisions.name: Rule_RLA_Relevant_for_Last_Activity_by_GTM
decisions.label: *Rule (RLA-GTM)* - Relevant for Last Activity by GTM?

rules.name: RLA_GTM_Relevant
rules.conditionLogic: ((1 OR 2 OR 3) AND 4 AND 5) AND 6 AND 7 AND 8 AND 9 AND 10 AND 11 AND 12 AND NOT(13) AND 14 AND 15

rightValue.stringValue: SW Read Only (View all GTM Data)
SW Read Only (View all GTM Data)

rules.label: RLA-GTM - Relevant

decisions.name: Rule_SACP_Status_is_Accepted_Accepted_by_CP
decisions.label: *Rule (SACP)* - Status is Accepted / Accepted by CP

rules.name: SCT_Yes
rules.conditionLogic: (1 OR 2) AND (3 OR 4 OR 5 OR 6) AND 7
rules.label: SCT - Yes

decisions.name: Rule_SECT_Sent_Email_or_Call_Task_Created
decisions.label: *Rule (SECT)* - Sent Email or Call Task Created

decisions.name: Rule_TLC_Task_is_Later_than_Contact_Last_Activity
decisions.label: *Rule (TLC)* - Task is Later than Contact Last Activity?

decisions.name: Rule_TLL_Task_is_Later_than_Lead_Last_Activity
decisions.label: *Rule (TLL)* - Task is Later than Lead Last Activity?

decisions.description: MIS-5548 MIS-8199 - accepted by cu agent MIS-8199 - added another outcome "Related Contact with MIR Status Completed"
decisions.name: Updated_Related_MIR_Status
decisions.label: Updated Related MIR Status

rules.name: Related_Lead_with_MIR_Status_Completed
rules.label: Related Lead with MIR Status Completed

rules.name: Related_Lead_with_MIR_Status_Accepted_by_CU_agent
rules.label: Related Lead with MIR Status Accepted by CU agent

rules.name: Related_Contact_with_MIR_Status_Accepted_by_CU_agent
rules.label: Related Contact with MIR Status Accepted by CU agent

rules.name: Related_Contact_with_MIR_Status_Completed
rules.label: Related Contact with MIR Status Completed

Flow.description: MIS-8441 - Opened CU Agent to A, B, C leads and updated conditions MIS-8390 - Added MIR Status update on Email Task creation MIS-8199 - when there is a CU task with the status " Accepted by CU Agent" -> MIR status on lead/conatct should change to "Agent replied - follow up" MIS-8138 - CU Agent open to D and contacts, Excluded Taiwan MIS-8114 - Merged DMLs MIS-8106 - Adjusted Eligible for CU Agent to VGR MIS-7957 - Added Eligible for CU Agent logic MIS-7636 - Added LastActivityDate handling MIS-7722 - Added SubType parsing from Catalyst task, Updated conditions to define Catalyst Note task MIS-7201 MIS-6919 - Status Bug Fix MIS-6473 - Update First MQL Date on Handraise MIS-6396 - Update BI Intent Score MIS-6229 - Added Last Activity by MIR MIS-6052 - Lead/Contact update when Call/Email Sent is created MIS-6072 - Lead/Contact Status Updates MIS-5548 MIS-5810 - excluded internal Account from last actiivity by GTM automation MIS-5675 - Added Last Activity by GTM SubFlow MIS-5271 MIS-4859 MIS-4611 - excluded Contact Us alert - status = Completed (Lead) MIS-4532 - excluded Contact Us alert - status = Completed (Account) MIS-4425 - Send CU Alert to Completed Tasks as well + Remove Slack notifications MIS-3137 - Splitting Alerts to Account Owner and Lead Owner MIS-1894 - Migrate Tasks and Events WF and PB to Flow MIS-8199 - Fixed a bug - After I create a completed task which should have changed the mir status to "In progress Touched." it does not change appearently. the fix was in the node "Update_Lead_Funnel_Status_Flag" Also added another assignment node "Update Contact Assignment"
Flow.interviewLabel: Task-Record Triggered Flow - After Save Flow {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Task-Record Triggered Flow - After Save Flow

recordUpdates.name: Cancel_Tasks_of_the_Same_Lead_Contact
recordUpdates.label: Cancel Tasks of the Same Lead/Contact

subflows.name: Send_to_Last_Activity_by_GTM_SubFlow
subflows.label: Send to Last Activity by GTM SubFlow

subflows.name: Send_to_Last_Activity_by_MIR_SubFlow
subflows.label: Send to Last Activity by MIR SubFlow
